framework_name: DSM-5-informed cognitive and affective symptom-domain profiling
clinical_boundary: This layer is non-diagnostic. It maps observed PHQ-9 item responses into symptom domains commonly discussed in DSM-5 depressive-disorder clinical interviews, but it does not diagnose any medical condition.

anhedonia.label: Interest and pleasure domain
anhedonia.description: Tracks reduced interest or pleasure signals from structured screening responses.

depressed_mood.label: Mood domain
depressed_mood.description: Tracks low mood or hopelessness signals from structured screening responses.

psychomotor.label: Psychomotor domain
psychomotor.description: Tracks observable slowing or restlessness signals.

risk_item.label: Safety-risk screening domain
risk_item.description: Tracks whether the safety-related PHQ-9 item was endorsed. Any non-zero value triggers a conservative safety flag.
